# example_datasets { #cdmconnector.example_datasets }

```python
example_datasets()
```

Return the list of available Eunomia example dataset names.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type              | Description                                                   |
|--------|-------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | tuple\[str, ...\] | Dataset names (e.g. "GiBleed", "synthea-allergies-10k", ...). |
